filePath.description: Source file path (relative to the project root, or absolute). When set, diagnostics are scoped to this file's syntax tree.

moduleName.description: Specific module to diagnose, or omit for all. When combined with filePath, picks the module that contains the file.

verbosity.description: 'compact' drops the full definesActive[] list (definesActiveCount is retained) for repeated focused checks. Default (verbose) returns the full list.
